title: Distorted Rex
description: The distorted rex from Jurassic World Rebirth
body:
Discription
The Distorted Rex is a terrifying mutated dinosaur. The Drex targets the player. It spawns idle not attacking until it spots you. When spotted he will attack the player. When the player is hit by the D Rex it will get a bleeding effect that slowly  kills the player, but also makes it that the D rex can find the player with smell.

The D rex can also sneak up on the player. When not spotted it will grab the player and kill it in one shot. But if the player does see the D rex behind him, the D rex will bite the player and kill him in one shot. If the player walks more than 10 blocks away the D rex will roar and attack the player.

Resource pack for a more movie accurate texture
Movie Distorted Rex - Minecraft Resource Packs - CurseForge

Disclaimers
!Know that: If you have many world gen mods the D rex might not spawn!

Disclaimer  this mod is not a dweller reskin!

This mod requires geckolib
